Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to group a list of 18 hospital process events into separate cases distinct patient journeys The attributes provided for each event are timestamp activity resource department patient age patient gender additional info Since there is no explicit case ID I need to group the events based on the patient attributes patient age patient gender department and the logical sequence of activities for a single patient

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets group by patient age and gender as these uniquely identify the cases here Case A 45 M Case B 62 F Case C 28 M

Text: Lets trace Case A 45 M Event 1 Register patient ER Event 4 Initial triage ER Event 7 X ray imaging Radiology Event 12 Doctor consultation ER Event 15 Patient discharged ER

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The logic is perfectly sound The demographics age plus gender uniquely identify the 3 distinct cases and the sequence of events perfectly matches standard hospital workflows for those specific scenarios ER visit with X ray ER visit with lab tests scheduled surgery
